hero.headline: Protecting Our Planet, One Action at a Time
hero.subheadline: GreenFuture empowers communities to create sustainable environmental change through education, conservation, and grassroots initiatives.

hero_image_prompt: Lush green landscape with diverse ecosystem, people of different ages planting trees, sustainable solar panels in background, natural lighting, vibrant green and earth tones

features.title: Community Conservation
features.description: Engage local communities in habitat restoration and wildlife protection projects.

features.title: Climate Education
features.description: Develop curriculum and workshops to teach sustainable practices in schools and communities.

features.title: Renewable Energy Advocacy
features.description: Promote clean energy solutions and support transition to sustainable infrastructure.

testimonials.quote: GreenFuture has transformed our community's approach to environmental stewardship.
testimonials.author: Maria Rodriguez, Community Leader

testimonials.quote: Their educational programs have inspired a new generation of environmental activists.
testimonials.author: Dr. James Chen, Environmental Scientist
